summary: After `origin/main` accepted ADR 0239, a latest-server check found that `nginx-lv3` was still serving the older MkDocs search bundle without the Pagefind publication or the `0.177.62` release page, so the exact merged mainline commit was replayed again through `make deploy-docs-portal` and re-verified on both the authenticated edge and the published docs tree.

verification.check: Post-merge drift detection on the live docs tree
verification.observed: After `git fetch origin --prune` confirmed `HEAD` and `origin/main` were both `48b8a79b02480f3cefa1b76e1e5ba88db9098cc6`, guest-local checks on `nginx-lv3` showed `/var/www/lv3-generated/docs-portal` still lacked `pagefind/pagefind-entry.json`, `pagefind/pagefind-ui.js`, `pagefind/pagefind-ui.css`, and `releases/0.177.62/index.html` even though the authenticated public edge still answered `302` behind OAuth.

`make deploy-docs-portal` rebuilt the docs portal with Pagefind reporting `Indexed 784 pages`, `Indexed 15027 words`, and `Indexed 6 filters`, then replayed the shared edge publication from source commit `48b8a79b02480f3cefa1b76e1e5ba88db9098cc6` with `LV3_RUN_ID=12349b9b76a24ed384af3c6650184963`, playbook run id `6e1f04fed42347009d0c9be9f6a1db45`, and recap `nginx-lv3 ok=63 changed=6 failed=0 skipped=12`.

Direct guest checks on `nginx-lv3` confirmed `/var/www/lv3-generated/docs-portal/pagefind/pagefind-entry.json`, `pagefind/pagefind-ui.js`, and `pagefind/pagefind-ui.css`; the published home page contains `id="pagefind-search"` plus `pagefind/pagefind-ui.js`; `releases/0.177.62/index.html` contains `0.130.45`; and `architecture/dependency-graph/index.html` contains `data-pagefind-filter="section"` without the earlier raw frontmatter leak.
`curl -ksSI https://docs.lv3.org/` returned `HTTP/2 302` with `location: https://docs.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://docs.lv3.org/` and `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow` after the replay.

notes: This receipt supersedes `2026-03-29-adr-0239-browser-local-search-mainline-live-apply` as the latest canonical docs-search evidence because it records the replay from the final merged `origin/main` commit after the stale live docs tree was detected.
The platform version stays at `0.130.45` because this replay restores the merged `0.177.62` publication rather than introducing a new platform capability.
